steps.title: 👋 Welcome to VCSM!
steps.message: Welcome to the Voice-Driven Virtual Customer Success Manager! Let's take a quick tour to help you get started.
steps.voiceText: Welcome to VCSM. Let's take a quick tour to help you get started.

steps.title: 📝 File a Complaint
steps.message: To file a complaint, click the 'New Complaint' button or use the voice command: 'I have a complaint'.
steps.voiceText: To file a complaint, click the New Complaint button or say 'I have a complaint'.

steps.title: 📋 Check Complaint Status
steps.message: Visit the Complaints page to track your complaint status. You can also say 'Check my complaint status'.
steps.voiceText: Visit the Complaints page to track your complaint status.

steps.title: 📅 Register for Events
steps.message: Check out upcoming community events and register with one click. Say 'Show upcoming events' to get started.
steps.voiceText: Check out upcoming community events and register with one click.

steps.title: 🎤 Voice Commands
steps.message: Use the microphone button to speak commands. Try saying 'How many complaints are open?' or 'Show upcoming events'.
steps.voiceText: Use the microphone button to speak commands.

steps.title: 🎉 You're Ready!
steps.message: You've completed the tutorial! Start managing your community with VCSM. You can always revisit this tutorial from the settings.
steps.voiceText: You've completed the tutorial! Start managing your community with VCSM.
